module.name: agent
module.purpose: Agent engine module, remoc-backed frontdoor session endpoint, public model request interface, Deepseek backend implementation through common external namespaces, and future retrieval/tool interfaces.

childModules.name: engine
childModules.purpose: Agent engine module reserved for orchestration implementation.

childModules.name: frontdoor
childModules.purpose: Agent frontdoor session endpoint backed by remoc/TCP and task endpoint stubs for future user-message tasks.

childModules.name: model
childModules.purpose: Public model request interface, crate-internal backend implementation boundary, model error definitions, and streaming Deepseek backend implementation through common external namespaces.
